title: Charlotte Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Charlotte with a Z-Score of +3.14. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Charlotte are extreme, with a heat index exacerbated by low humidity of 26%.
The wind speed of 10.8 km/h is not sufficient to provide relief from the heat, with CDD at 10.0 GG and HDD at 0.0 GG.
The heat wave is expected to continue, with no signs of significant precipitation or temperature drops in the near future.
conclusion: Activate emergency protocols to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
